metadata.source: Leeds University Internet Japanese Word Frequency List
metadata.corpus: Word frequencies from a 253-million-token web-crawled Japanese corpus tokenized with ChaSen. Lemmatized to dictionary forms. Covers web-text register (news, blogs, forums). Complements frequency-newspaper.json (kanji only, newspaper) and frequency-subtitles.json (spoken media).
metadata.attribution: Frequency data from the Leeds University corpus, compiled by Serge Sharoff. See: Sharoff, S. (2006) 'Creating general-purpose corpora using automated search engine queries.' In M. Baroni and S. Bernardini (eds.) WaCky! Working papers on the Web as Corpus, Gedit, Bologna. http://corpus.leeds.ac.uk/

field_notes.text: Lemma (dictionary form) as tokenized by ChaSen.
field_notes.rank: Rank by web frequency. 1 = most frequent in web corpus.
field_notes.count: Approximate raw count (derived from ipm × corpus size).

entries.reading: エンターテインメント
アメリカがっしゅうこく
たいへいようせんそう
けいざいきかくちょう
